misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: table of contents for May 1917 issue, advertisers directory listing local Salt Lake City businesses, General Board member listings with officers and staff, and back matter with advertisements for various products and services (Columbia Grafonolas, furniture, shoes, railroad travel, books, etc.). Also includes partial text from Guide Lessons (Home Economics lesson on food digestion factors) which appears to be a continuation or fragment from an already extracted lesson file. No standalone articles, poems, or editorials are present that haven't already been extracted.
